title: The shortcut pattern
drDigitalIntro:
Here's the secret: shortcuts follow one simple pattern.
• Hold Ctrl (or Command) and press a letter.
• C copies, V pastes, X cuts, Z undoes, S saves.
• A selects all, F finds, P prints, N is new, W closes, T is a new tab.
drDigitalSuccess: You've got the pattern — Command plus a letter. That unlocks almost every shortcut!
drDigitalHint: Take your time with the pattern, then click Continue whenever you're ready.
